overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, massive digital billboards, and wet city streets. The footage showcases high-end game engine graphics with cinematic lighting, palm trees, and detailed urban architecture reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial sidewalk at night, passing futuristic outdoor seating pods and illuminated storefronts. The Delamain billboard dominates the right side while palm trees line the distant street. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposing direction as the camera approaches an intersection.

segments.scene_description: Crossing a major intersection beneath an elevated pedestrian walkway adorned with yellow warning banners. The camera moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk as a futuristic vehicle passes by. Digital billboard towers and the El Guapo advertisement become visible as the camera tilts up to appreciate the towering architecture.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a downtown commercial corridor surrounded by massive digital displays and floating holographic advertisements. The camera pans up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers reaching into the night sky. The El Guapo billboard moves closer on the right as the camera approaches a more open plaza area with increased pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a commercial sidewalk into the heart of a towering, neon-drenched downtown corridor. It begins by passing futuristic outdoor seating pods and illuminated storefronts, with a dominant Delamain billboard and distant palm trees framing the walk toward a busy intersection. As the camera moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk, it passes beneath an elevated pedestrian walkway draped in yellow warning banners while a futuristic vehicle glides by. The scene then expands as the camera tilts upward to reveal massive digital billboard towers and the El Guapo advertisement, shifting the focus toward the overwhelming scale of the surrounding architecture. Finally, the movement carries the viewer deeper into a commercial plaza where floating holographic advertisements and glass skyscrapers reach into the night sky amidst a growing crowd of pedestrians.
